{{Quote|You can never jail too many smugglers.|Aarica Vost|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Aarica Vost''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as an intelligence agent for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. She worked under the alias "Bren-Aarica Rordan," and was the daughter of [[Larin Vost]], head of [[Corporate Expansion]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
